title: wasm/ffi connect() leaves [u8;64] key material on stack without zeroization
description: wasm/src/api.rs:153 and ffi/src/api/client.rs:106 both decode secret_b64 into arr: [u8; 64] stack local and pass it to Identity::from_secret_bytes, then arr is dropped without zeroization. Raw Ed25519+X25519 seeds remain readable in process memory until overwritten by future stack frames. Distinct from nie-kef6.55 which covers storage::load_identity return value.
